questions.q: Which Colorado Avalanche player scored the overtime winner to complete an epic 3-0 comeback and oust the Minnesota Wild in Game 5 of the 2026 playoffs?
Which highly anticipated underwater exploration sequel officially released in Early Access on Steam in May 2026?
Why did golfer Rory McIlroy cut his PGA Championship practice round short in May 2026?
Rare's 'Sea of Thieves' recently faced an exodus of content creators due to community fallout surrounding what serious issue?
options: Sexual misconduct allegations against a community member
A mass false-ban wave affecting streamers
The cancellation of the game's competitive mode
questions.correctText: Sexual misconduct allegations against a community member
